title: Project Planning
content: Need to finalize the daily notes app features and design mockups

title: Meeting Notes
content: Discussed the backend API design for the notes app. Decided to use REST architecture with PostgreSQL database.

title: Personal Reminders
content: Remember to review the UI components and test the app on different devices

title: Ideas for Features
content:
1. Add search functionality
2. Implement categories/tags
3. Add dark mode support
4. Enable note sharing
